title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Bank of India Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Bank of India Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Bank of India Holdings Services family as a Risk Analyst in Mumbai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Bank of India Holdings Services:
Bank of India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bank of India Holdings Services!
